# Culture Connects — vendor & panelist spotlight images

`culture-connects.html` references the files below. Drop the full IG graphics
here with these exact names and the cards light up automatically (no code change).
Until a file exists, its card shows a branded gold-framed placeholder.

Recommended: the 1080×1350 (4:5) graphics as-is — the card aspect ratio matches,
so nothing gets cropped.

## Vendors — "03 — The vendors"
| File | Brand | Type | Links to |
|---|---|---|---|
| `by-donavan-amir.jpg` | By Donavan-Amir | Clothing | instagram.com/bydonavanamir |
| `slo-burn.jpg` | Slo Burn | Beverage | instagram.com/sloburn.atx |
| `sideshow.jpg` | Sideshow | Clothing | instagram.com/sideshow.us |

Panelist images now live in `assets/panelists/` (see that folder's README).
